infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to attach location to notes and create geofences for proactive reminders.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Used for background geofence monitoring so you receive relevant notes when you arrive at a location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Used for background geofence monitoring so you receive relevant notes when you arrive at a location.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Used for background geofence monitoring so you receive relevant notes when you arrive at a location.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Used for background geofence monitoring so you receive relevant notes when you arrive at a location.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Used to attach location to notes and create geofences.
